attacking_style: Attacks before steep climbs rather than on them, then uses technical descending skills to create separation. Prefers to launch moves ahead of gradients where others expect attacks.
team_tactics: Insufficient data to determine team setup patterns across multiple races.
terrain_preference: Excels on technical descents (20% gradient handled) and can position aggressively before steep climbs (10%+). Descending ability appears to be key weapon for distancing pure climbers.
vulnerability: Unknown - limited observations available to identify weaknesses across different scenarios.
key_patterns: Attacks positioned before major climbs, not during them (1 observation)
Uses descending as primary separation tool against climbing specialists (1 observation)
U23 world champion pedigree translating to Grand Tour stage-winning capability (1 observation)
form_trajectory: positive: Won solo at Vuelta with tactical maturity, confirming progression from U23 world champion status
